nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-browed treecreeper
nodes.summary: White-browed treecreeper（White-browed treecreeper，学名 Climacteris affinis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、气候变化。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Threats to the white-browed treecreeper include habitat loss and fragmentation due to land clearing

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Such threats have resulted in population declines and range contractions within some regions including Victoria, Australia, within which the species is now listed as Threatened under state legislation. The white-browed treecreeper has also been recognised as a species highly exposed to the effects of climate change
